network_summary: Dr. Lawrence (Larry) Mulvaney, DDS, MBA, FICOI is the President and owner of Northwestern Dental Group (NWDG), a multi-location dental group founded in Niles, IL in 1987. He is a dentist-owner with 30+ years of experience who built a 4-7 location Chicagoland group under his own brand. No MSO, management company, PE backer, or DSO platform layer has been found. The two AO-linked watched locations are both on N Milwaukee Ave in Niles (ZIP 60714): the original LTD corporate entity and a second LLC DBA entity at a nearby address. Lorraine Mulvaney handles complaint resolution per BBB — family-operated group.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Lawrence (Larry) Mulvaney, DDS, MBA, FICOI — President and owner, Northwestern Dental Group LTD; 30+ years general/cosmetic/implant dentistry; DDS from University of Illinois Dental School Chicago; MBA from Keller Graduate School; FICOI (International Congress of Oral Implantologists fellow).

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Location 7230bc8117b4055b is currently classified as dso_national in the DB — this appears to be a misclassification. Northwestern Dental Group LTD is Dr. Mulvaney's own dentist-owned group, not a national DSO brand. Recommend reclassification to dso_regional or small_group pending downstream gate review. The two Milwaukee Ave addresses (~0.1 mile apart) represent the original LTD entity (7745) and a newer LLC entity (7886) operated under the same owner — not two independent businesses.
evidence_chain: AO signal: LAWRENCE MULVANEY appears as authorized official on both NPI 1508080110 (Northwestern Dental Group LTD) and NPI 1093089690 (NWDG Niles LLC) in ZIP 60714. Documentary corroboration: (1) northwesterndentalgroup.com confirms a multi-location group brand (Niles, Vernon Hills, Deerfield, Gurnee) with Dr. Larry Mulvaney as the featured doctor; (2) LinkedIn profile for Larry Mulvaney DDS MBA FICOI titles him 'President at Northwestern Dental Group'; (3) BBB profile for Northwestern Dental Group LTD confirms Dr. Lawrence Mulvaney as President, business type Corporation, est. 1987, no corporate parent; (4) NWDG abbreviation in LLC name ties both legal entities to the same brand. No MSO/management company/PE/DSO platform layer found across three web searches and two page fetches.
future_app_notes: NWDG has 4-7 locations across Chicagoland; only the two Niles locations appear in the current watched-IL AO cluster. Other NWDG locations (Vernon Hills ZIP 60061, Deerfield ZIP 60015, Gurnee ZIP 60085, Skokie, Arlington Heights) may be in watched ZIPs but were not surfaced in this AO cluster — worth querying the DB for NWDG/Northwestern Dental Group name matches across watched ZIPs to capture the full network footprint. The dso_national classification on 7230bc8117b4055b is likely a false positive from a name-chain or brand match; the real structure is dentist_owned_multi. Watch for any PE/MSO transaction involving NWDG given the founder's MBA and multi-location growth trajectory.
